title: Mona Gasolina Lyrics Lingaa Song Lyrics

Mona Gasolina Lyrics From Lingaa Movie
Lyrics:Madhan Karky
Singer(s):Mano, Neeti Mohan, Tanvi Shah

Mona mona mona mona
hey mona mona
mano Gasolina

adi mona my dear gasolina
nenju thaana kodikkudhadi
tramploleena

Un kannu compass-aa
naa un colampus-aa
nangooram, naan poda
nee aada kadal vedikkudhu
pattaasaa..

gasolina naanthaaney
hey lingaa adalaam
lingaa lingaa

naan inga thangam-naa
neethaan kinga-ah

kappallula thee vechcha
kadalula tea vechcha
kaththodu kaththaaga
en nenjil thee vachcha

Mona mona mona mona
hey mona mona
mano Gasolina

gazzana gazzana
pola un mona.
porkkasu nee allu
thirakkavaa

Neethaney medinga
oh neetha gasolina
Neethaney
oh neetha gasolina

Sarangi nerambanaana
yengi kidandhaen.
nee enna urasa
naan enna marandhaen.

beerangi kulalil
naan thoongi kidandhaen.
nee kadhala koluththa
naan vaanil parandhaen.

sollaa idhu
vella vella manasu
theerpaache

yaarum enna idumunnapola
adichadhillayae.

nenju thaana kodikkudhadi

ambadichi meen adichaen
ambadichi maan adichaen
ennoda kannoda ammbaala
thaeney unna kudichaen.

Naanthaaney naanthaaney
bonithaa gasolina
Naanthaaney bonithaa gasolina

Un katta viralil
naan raega eduthaen.
adha neththiyila
vachchi naan unna thorandhaen.

Naan kani kaninipol
pootti kidadhaen.
muththa vachi nee thorakka
kadhal sorandhaen.

hey thekka thaekka
idhayatha hack pannu
ulla ulla ena ena
paarthaney.

sirai pidachadhillaye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mona Gasolina'?

The song 'Mona Gasolina' celebrates love and joy, using playful lyrics to convey a sense of fun and excitement.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Lingaa'?

In Lingaa, the song is a lively number that showcases the characters' joyful moments, enhancing the film's festive atmosphere.

Who are the singers of 'Mona Gasolina'?

The song features the voices of Mano, Neeti Mohan, and Tanvi Shah.

Who wrote the lyrics for 'Mona Gasolina'?

The lyrics were penned by Karky, known for his catchy and engaging writing style.

When was 'Mona Gasolina' released?

'Mona Gasolina' was released on November 19, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Mona Gasolina', the vibrant energy of the song reflects the joyous moments shared by the characters in Lingaa. The upbeat tempo and playful lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect dance number. The collaboration of talented singers Mano, Neeti Mohan, and Tanvi Shah adds a unique charm to the track. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of love and festivity, inviting listeners to join in the celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mona Gasolina from Lingaa is a vibrant celebration of love and energy, featuring a unique collaboration between the talented voices of Mano, Neeti Mohan, and Tanvi Shah. The infectious beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere that's perfect for any festive occasion. Experience the joy and rhythm that makes this song a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema!
stanzaMeanings: Mona, Mona, Mona, Mona, hey Mona, Mona, Mano Gasolina
Oh Mona, my dear Gasolina, my heart is not just a tram, it's something more.
Your eyes are like a compass, I am your guide, you dance while I go, the sea is calling you.
Gasolina, that's me, hey Lingaa, that's all Lingaa, Lingaa.
If I am gold here, you are the king.
In the sea, I put fire, in the sea, I put tea, with a stick, I set my heart on fire.
Mona, Mona, Mona, Mona, hey Mona, Mona, Mano Gasolina
Like a gazelle, your Mona, are you going to move or not?
Oh Neetha, you are my treasure, oh Neetha, Gasolina, oh Neetha, Gasolina.
I was sleeping in the beer pot, you took my heart and flew in the sky.
This is a clear heart, it has solved everything.
No one has hit me like this before.
Mona, Mona, Mona, Mona, hey Mona, Mona, Mano Gasolina
Oh Mona, my dear Gasolina, my heart is not just a tram, it's something more.
I caught a fish with my hand, I caught a deer with my hand, I drank honey from my mother's eyes.
I am Gasolina, that's me, I am Gasolina.
I took your hand in mine, I placed it on my heart, and I showed you my love.
I put my heart like a fruit, you opened it with a pearl, love has blossomed.
Hey, don't hack my heart, I saw everything inside.
No one has captured me like this until now.
Mona, Mona, Mona, Mona, hey Mona, Mona, Mano Gasolina
Oh Mona, my dear Gasolina, my heart is not just a tram, it's something more.
Your eyes are like a compass, I am your guide, you dance while I go, the sea is calling you.
